text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh, it's here! This year's Arima is
incredible! All three big stars are running!

text_block_list.name: Host A
text_block_list.text:
Welcome to this year's Arima Kinen! Who'll reign
supreme in this contest of dreams?!

text_block_list.name: Host A
text_block_list.text:
First up, we have the uncrowned champion of the
Classic year! As a regional racer, she didn't run in
the Triple Crown, but her power is undeniable!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
For myself and everyone back at home... I can't
lose.

text_block_list.name: Host A
text_block_list.text:
Next, we have the undisputed champion of the
senior year. The small, white giant with
oh-so-many G1 victories.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Aw, yeah! Time to show everybody what this
Osaka girl can do! I'll take 'em all out!

text_block_list.name: Host A
text_block_list.text:
And finally, we have our late-blooming superstar
who's come so far with her greenhorn trainer.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Come on, Trainer! Hop on up here with me. Don't
be shy now!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You're not takin' this seriously! Okay, thassit.
We're done. Shut it down, everybody!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe! People were kind of laughing at us, huh?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But this race is the final chapter of a difficult
year. This isn't the time or place for regrets.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Thanks. Even Tamtam was concerned for me
regarding my journey here.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'll make sure to repay the favor by running the
best race I can! ♪
